events.text: Your first day of primary school. You clutch a new exercise book while Mama adjusts your uniform outside the school gate.

choices.label: Wave goodbye bravely
choices.resultText: You walked into class with your head held high.

choices.label: Cry and hold Mama's hand
choices.resultText: Mama stayed a few minutes until you settled in.

events.text: Older pupils mock your accent in the playground. A crowd gathers while you stand frozen.

choices.label: Tell a teacher
choices.resultText: The teacher intervened. The bullies were warned.

choices.label: Ask your sibling for backup
choices.resultText: Your sibling stood up for you. You felt less alone.

choices.label: Fight back
choices.resultText: A scuffle broke out. Everyone got in trouble.

events.text: During a class test, your deskmate slides their answer sheet toward you and whispers an offer.

choices.label: Copy the answers
choices.resultText: You passed the test but felt guilty. The teacher almost caught you.

choices.label: Refuse and focus on your own paper
choices.resultText: You did your best honestly. It felt right.

events.text: After KCPE, your family debates where you should attend secondary school — a nearby day school or a boarding school upcountry.

choices.label: Day scholar near home
choices.resultText: You commute daily by matatu. Mama packs lunch every morning.

choices.label: Boarding school upcountry
choices.resultText: Term one was lonely, but the library was excellent.

events.text: After your {secondaryExam} results, your family debates where you should attend secondary school — a nearby day school or a boarding school farther away.

choices.label: Day scholar near home
choices.resultText: You commute daily by {transportMode}. Home-cooked lunch every morning.

choices.label: Boarding school away from home
choices.resultText: Term one was lonely, but the library was excellent.

events.text: Inter-house sports day! The whole school gathers on the dusty field for races and cheers.

choices.label: Run the 100m race
choices.resultText: You came third but the crowd cheered your effort.

choices.label: Cheer from the sidelines
choices.resultText: You painted your face in house colours and shouted yourself hoarse.

events.text: Class representative elections are announced. Nominations open at the front of the classroom.

choices.label: Run for class rep
choices.resultText: You gave a speech and won by a handful of votes.

choices.label: Campaign for a friend
choices.resultText: Your friend won. They owe you a soda.

choices.label: Stay out of politics
choices.resultText: You avoided drama and focused on homework.

events.text: You notice someone in your class laughing at a joke you made. Your heart beats a little faster.

choices.label: Daydream about them
choices.resultText: You floated through the week on a cloud of butterflies.

choices.label: Focus on your studies
choices.resultText: Books before feelings. Wise, if a little boring.

events.text: A new school year begins. How are you approaching your studies this year?

choices.label: Coast through (Slack)
choices.resultText: You spent more time on the pitch than in the library.

choices.label: Keep a steady pace (Normal)
choices.resultText: You balanced homework and play reasonably well.

choices.label: Grind hard (Hard)
choices.resultText: Late nights at your desk. Your notebooks are full.

events.text: {secondaryExam} season looms. The revision timetable is pinned to the classroom wall.

choices.label: Slack off and hope for the best
choices.resultText: You winged it. Not your finest academic hour.

choices.label: Study normally
choices.resultText: Consistent revision paid off modestly.

choices.label: Grind every night
choices.resultText: You sacrificed sleep for past papers. Worth it, probably.

events.text: A university careers fair visits your school. Booths line the hall for Law, Medicine, Engineering, and more.

choices.label: Explore the Medicine booth
choices.resultText: You pictured yourself in a white coat someday.

choices.label: Explore the Law booth
choices.resultText: Courtroom dramas suddenly felt within reach.

choices.label: Skip the fair
choices.resultText: You hung out behind the hall instead.

events.text: As a senior student, you are asked to help maintain order during lunch break.

choices.label: Enforce the rules strictly
choices.resultText: Some students grumbled, but the teachers approved.

choices.label: Let small things slide
choices.resultText: You gained popularity for being fair and relaxed.

events.text: You discover the school library has novels beyond the syllabus. The librarian shushes you as you enter.

choices.label: Read voraciously
choices.resultText: Stories expanded your vocabulary and imagination.

choices.label: Borrow one book only
choices.resultText: A small habit formed. One book became two.
